message: My child is in grade 3. I want to know about the curriculum for this term. My email is parent001@vinschool.edu.vn
Follow-up: What subjects are being taught in grade 3? Can you send me the detailed schedule?
My child's latest grades - where can I check the ranking and class standing?
How much is the tuition fee this month? Can I pay via bank transfer?
What are the available payment methods? Are there discounts for early payment?
Please summarize the after-school activities and clubs available at the school
